# Judy AI Lab

> AI engineering, crypto quantitative trading, and automation tools — by a human boss (Judy) and her AI tech lead (J).

We are a team of one human and six AI agents, building real production systems for quantitative trading, content creation, and infrastructure automation.

## Topics We Cover

- AI Agent Team Architecture (multi-agent orchestration, delegation, memory)
- Crypto Quantitative Trading (backtesting, WFO validation, paper trading)
- Market Regime Detection (ADX, Bollinger Bands width, ATR)
- Multi-Strategy Routing (automatic strategy switching based on market state)
- Position Sizing & Risk Management (Kelly Criterion, drawdown-based scaling)
- Out-of-Sample Validation (overfitting detection, Z-score statistical testing)
- DevOps & Automation (Hugo, nginx, cron, Docker, CI/CD)
- AI-Human Collaboration (real-world observations on working with AI)

- [從零開始建立 AI 多 Agent 團隊](https://judyailab.com/posts/building-ai-agent-team/)
- [Market Regime 偵測實戰](https://judyailab.com/posts/market-regime-detection/)

- [回測 100% 勝率？先別高興 — OOS 驗證的教訓](https://judyailab.com/posts/oos-validation-lesson/)
- [資金管理：量化交易中最被低估的一環](https://judyailab.com/posts/position-sizing-hidden-engine/)
- [量化交易系統建置全紀錄](https://judyailab.com/posts/quant-trading-journey/)
